input_output_options.title: Input/output options
input_output_options.description: Define where the pipeline should find input data and save output data.

input.description: Directory where bam files are located
input.help_text: Directory where bam files are. Input can be {nanopore_hash}/bam_pass/barcode_xx/, {nanopore_hash}/bam_pass/ or {nanopore_hash}/.

outdir.description: The output directory where the results will be saved. Must use absolute paths to storage on Cloud infrastructure.
outdir.help_text: Output directory where sturgeon results will be stored

barcode.description: barcode used for sequencing, integer from 01 to 99
barcode.help_text: barcodes for 01-09 can be given as e.g. 01, or 1

model.description: Model file (zip file) used for sturgeon classifier
